zh.lifeSummary: 當Aenor Mauléon於1138年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯時，她的父親Ebles de Mauléon23歲，母親Eustachie de Lezay11135歲。她和Pierre de Preuilly II至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1204年在法國阿奎泰享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aenor Mauléon于1138年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯时，她的父亲Ebles de Mauléon23岁，母亲Eustachie de Lezay11135岁。她和Pierre de Preuilly II至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1204年在法国阿奎泰享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mauléon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Basque: habitational name from a place called Mauléon-Licharre in French, Maule-Lextarre in Basque, the capital of the Soule province in the French part of the Basque Country. This surname is much more common in Spain, where it is also spelled in a Castilianized form Mauleón, than in France, where it is spelled Mauléon.

nameMeanings.name: Aenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently a form of Gaynor adapted to Welsh orthography. It also may have been influenced by the name of the saint commemorated at Llangeinwyr in Glamorgan, known popularly as Llangeinor. Her name is derived from Welsh cain ‘beautiful’ + (g)wyry(f) ‘maiden’.

en.lifeSummary: When Aenor Mauléon was born in 1138, in Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, her father, Ebles de Mauléon, was 23 and her mother, Eustachie de Lezay, was 11135. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Pierre de Preuilly II. She died in 1204, in Aquitaine, France, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aenor Mauléon est née en 1138, à Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Ebles de Mauléon, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Eustachie de Lezay, avait 11135 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Pierre de Preuilly II. Elle est décédée en 1204, à Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aenor Mauléon 1138 in Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ebles de Mauléon 23 und ihre Mutter Eustachie de Lezay 11135. Sie hatte mit Pierre de Preuilly II mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1204 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aenor Mauléon è nata il nel 1138 nel Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, sua padre, Ebles de Mauléon, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Eustachie de Lezay, aveva 11135 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Pierre de Preuilly II. Morì nel 1204, nel Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aenor Mauléonが1138年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツデウクス-スevレスで生まれた時，父Ebles de Mauléonは23歳，母Eustachie de Lezayは11135歳であった。彼女はPierre de Preuilly IIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1204年にフランスアクイティアインで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aenor Mauléon(이)가 1138년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 데우스-스e브레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ebles de Mauléon(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eustachie de Lezay(은)는 11135세였다. 그녀는 Pierre de Preuilly II(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1204년 프랑스 아키테인에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aenor Mauléon nasceu em 1138, em Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Ebles de Mauléon, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Eustachie de Lezay, tinha 11135 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Pierre de Preuilly II. Ela faleceu em 1204, em Aquitaine, França, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aenor Mauléon родилась в 1138 г. в местности деукс-сeвресь, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Ebles de Mauléon было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Eustachie de Lezay, 11135. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Pierre de Preuilly II. Она умерла в 1204 г. в местности аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aenor Mauléon nació en 1138, en Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, Ebles de Mauléon, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Eustachie de Lezay, tenía 11135 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Pierre de Preuilly II. Murió en 1204, en Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 66 años.
